tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL

tools.name: browser_go_back
tools.description: Go back to the previous page

tools.name: browser_go_forward
tools.description: Go forward to the next page

tools.name: browser_form_input_fill
tools.description: Fill out an input field, before using the tool, Either 'index' or 'selector' must be provided

tools.name: browser_get_markdown
tools.description: Get the markdown content of the current page

tools.name: browser_get_text
tools.description: Get the text content of the current page

tools.name: browser_read_links
tools.description: Get all links on the current page

tools.name: browser_new_tab
tools.description: Open a new tab

tools.name: browser_tab_list
tools.description: Get the list of tabs

tools.name: browser_switch_tab
tools.description: Switch to a specific tab

tools.name: browser_close_tab
tools.description: Close the current tab

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser console

tools.name: browser_get_download_list
tools.description: Get the list of downloaded files

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page, before using the tool, use `browser_get_clickable_elements` to get the index of the element, but not call `browser_get_clickable_elements` multiple times

tools.name: browser_select
tools.description: Select an element on the page with index, Either 'index' or 'selector' must be provided

tools.name: browser_hover
tools.description: Hover an element on the page, Either 'index' or 'selector' must be provided

tools.name: browser_get_clickable_elements
tools.description: Get the clickable or hoverable or selectable elements on the current page, don't call this tool multiple times

tools.name: browser_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the browser when the task is done and the browser is not needed anymore

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a key on the keyboard

findings.description: Parameter 'url' accepts arbitrary URLs — potential SSRF vector
Parameter 'url' accepts arbitrary URLs — potential SSRF vector
Parameter 'script' accepts arbitrary string input for execution
